content.en:
The extra-dimensional epoch is a unit of time, and the billion extra-dimensional epochs are a multi-dimensional tribulation, during which there will be many disasters, but there is no threat to the fourth realm.

But after nine multi-dimensional tribulations, it will lead to multi-dimensional tribulations.

In other words, a multidimensional eons are 10 billion extradimensional epochs.

These are incomparably long years, and a multidimensional tribulation is an incomparably long time for any Fourth Realm.

And the multidimensional tribulation is very dangerous, and countless living beings will fall at that time, and even many extradimensional realms will not survive.

"It's no wonder that among the many extradimensional realms, there are no ordinary beings who have lived for an infinite number of years. Many ordinary beings have cultivated to a certain level, and their lifespan is almost unlimited, but once they encounter a multi-dimensional tribulation, they will not survive, and at that time, many extra-dimensional realms will re-breed living beings!"

There is very little information about the Multidimensional Tribulation, and he only knows that many Fourth Realms will fall into the Multidimensional Tribulation, unless there is a hegemon-level force to protect them, they can protect many lives.

Of course, during the Multi-Dimensional Tribulation, it was also the easiest time to break through, and in the last Multi-Dimensional Tribulation, there were three Fourth Realm who broke through to the Fifth Realm.

Now, more than 9 billion extradimensional epochs have passed since the last multidimensional tribulation, and now there are only a few hundred million extradimensional epochs left before the next multidimensional tribulation.

Therefore, many of the Fourth Realms are ready to move, looking forward to this multi-dimensional tribulation, after all, only by relying on the multi-dimensional tribulation, they have the hope of stepping into the fifth realm, but they are also afraid of the multi-dimensional tribulation.

Because once the multidimensional tribulation comes, too many fourth realms will fall, and the number of third and second realms will fall even more.

Of course.

The major overlord-level extradimensional forces will suppress the spread of this news, and ordinary beings will not know about this news at all, otherwise it will cause a certain amount of chaos.

However, it is also because the hundreds of millions of extradimensional epochs are still very long, and if there are only tens of thousands of extradimensional epochs left, then many extradimensional territories will be extremely chaotic.

"Multidimensional Apocalypse!!!"

Ye Tian's expression was solemn.

He knew very well that if he couldn't break through to the fifth realm, he wouldn't be able to shelter the Terrans, and at that time, countless Terrans would fall into the multidimensional tribulation, and no matter how hard he tried, he wouldn't be able to protect them.

He is very confident in his talent, but how to break through to the fifth realm, he really doesn't have a certain certainty at the moment, because it is really too difficult to break through to the fifth realm.

The soul will step into the ninth dimension, this is only one of the conditions, and it is necessary to comprehend the extradimensional rules to an extremely high realm.

This extremely high realm is enough to make many Fourth Realms feel hopeless.

His current extra-dimensional rules are only more than two hundred, and his comprehension of a thousand is only a small achievement in the realm of extra-dimensional rules, and this realm still cannot break through to the fifth realm.

It is rumored that the probability of a thousand extra-dimensional rules to impact the fifth realm is only 1 in 10,000, and the fifth realm after the breakthrough is very weak, and the potential is almost zero, and it is difficult to continue to break through to a higher realm.

Only by raising the realm of extra-dimensional rules to 10,000 realms, that is, reaching the realm of super-dimensional rules, can there be a chance of breaking through to the fifth realm by about 30%.

If you want to break through to the fifth realm 100%, you must comprehend the extra-dimensional rules to 100,000 realms, complete the extra-dimensional rules realm, and then raise the soul will to the ninth dimension.

In this way, you will be able to step into the fifth realm 100%.

But if you want to do this, it's too difficult, even if there are multiple Fifth Realms behind it, giving and providing countless resources, and crazy help them cultivate, they can't do it.

This is also the reason why those overlord-level forces can't raise a Fourth Realm to this level at the cost of billions, and can only use the multi-dimensional tribulation.

"The Multidimensional Tribulation is both a disaster and a great opportunity, but unfortunately there are still hundreds of millions of years before the Multidimensional Tribulation, and I can't expect to wait until the Multidimensional Tribulation, otherwise once the Multidimensional Tribulation comes, it is estimated that the human race will fall in a short time, and even if I find a great opportunity and break through to the fifth realm, it will be too late!"

Ye Tian said helplessly.

At that time, he will resurrect some weak human races at most, but his relatives' cultivation is extremely high, and he can't be resurrected at all.

In terms of cultivation, you can slowly improve, hundreds of millions of extradimensional eras, and you will be able to break through to the peak realm of the fourth realm 100%....

But the extra-dimensional rules are difficult to improve, but it is not just a multi-dimensional treasure bottle that can help him improve, there must be a greater opportunity.

So, in the following days, Ye Tian explored the great opportunity to help quickly improve the extradimensional rules.

After a period of time, Ye Tian really inquired.

"The Taiwu Sword Sect and the Chilin Clan are at war!"

These two forces are very powerful, although there is no fifth realm, but there are also many fourth realms, and they are all terrifying forces that have survived from the last multidimensional tribulation to the present, and their background is far from comparable to ordinary strength.

The Chilin Clan occupies the Ten Dimensional Treasure Tree, which is a Treasure Tree rooted in the Tenth Dimension, and the Ten Dimensional Treasure Liquid absorbed by this Treasure Tree can help to comprehend the extradimensional rules.

It's just that extracting the ten-dimensional treasure liquid from the ten-dimensional treasure tree will consume the origin of the ten-dimensional treasure tree, and you can't absorb too much at one time, otherwise the ten-dimensional treasure tree will be seriously damaged.

"Ten Dimensional Treasure Tree, Ten Dimensional Treasure Liquid!"

Ye Tian was really a little moved, the value of the ten-dimensional treasure liquid that countless Fourth Realms had dreamed of was absolutely unimaginable, and it would make his extra-dimensional rules rise significantly.

Such an opportunity should not be missed!

In normal times, the Chilin Clan had a large number of Fourth Realms, as well as many powerful formations, and if he wanted to snatch the Ten Dimensional Treasure Liquid, he would undoubtedly not be able to do it.

You must know that the formation of the Chilin Clan can even resist the existence of the Fifth Realm for a short time.

2.0 is different now, the Taiwu Sword Sect and the Chilin Clan have been killed for countless years, consuming a lot of the strength of the Chilin Clan, and destroying many of the Chilin Clan's formations.

Now, Ye Tian has been mixed into the battle, and there is definitely hope that he will capture some Shiwei Treasure Liquid.

......

Four thousand three hundred and twenty-one territory.

This is the territory of the Chilin Clan and the Taiwu Sword Sect, and these two major forces have been fighting here, and this extradimensional territory has been ruined everywhere.

this day.

Ye Tian infiltrated here and secretly inquired about the latest information.

According to his understanding, the Chilin Clan is in an absolute weakness, and it won't last long, once it is completely broken by the Taiwu Sword Sect, the Ten Dimensional Treasure Tree will completely belong to the Taiwu Sword Sect, and it will be difficult for them to reap the benefits.
